abort.already_configured: This EvolvIOT account is already configured.

error.authorization_denied: Pairing was denied in the EvolvIOT app.
error.authorization_expired: The previous pairing session expired. Start pairing again.
error.authorization_pending: Pairing is not approved yet. Enter the pairing code in the EvolvIOT app, then submit again.

progress.pair: Waiting for approval in the EvolvIOT app. Pairing code: {user_code}

pair.description:
Pairing code: `{user_code}`

Profile > Third party services > Home Assistant > Enter code.

After the app shows success, select Submit.
pair.title: Enter the EvolvIOT pairing code

user.description: Home Assistant could not start EvolvIOT pairing. Check the EvolvIOT backend connection and retry.
user.title: Connect EvolvIOT
